zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Browne於1549年5月23日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍可頓時，他的父親Robert Brown24歲，母親Ann Fitz Alan22歲。他於1562年與Ann Yates在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1629年6月7日在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Browne was born on 23 May 1549, in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Brown, was 24 and his mother, Ann Fitz Alan, was 22. He married Ann Yates in 1562, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 7 June 1629, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Browne est né le 23 mai 1549, à Hawkedon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Brown, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ann Fitz Alan, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ann Yates en 1562, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 juin 1629, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Hawkedon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Browne(이)가 1549년 5월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호케던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Brown(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Fitz Alan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Ann Yates(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1629년 6월 7일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호케던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Browne родился 23 мая 1549 г. в местности ховкедон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Brown было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Fitz Alan, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Yates в 1562 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 июня 1629 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности ховкедон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
